name: Spinach-Artichoke Dip (Chicago Style)
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces Artichoke Hearts, drained and rinsed, chopped
10 ounces Chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and 2 oz of Parmesan cheese in a 2-quart casserole dish. Stir in spinach and artichokes.
2. Mix well. Cover top with Monterey Jack cheese and the remaining 1 oz of Parmesan cheese.
3. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F. Then, broil for about 5 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
4. Serve with tortilla chips and side dishes of sour cream and your favorite salsa.
